transcript: Tell Lucille about the disaster you had with the stationers. Well, of course, the invitations had to be sent back twice. Oh, my dear. And the dreadful bridesmaids gowns. Let me tell you what an odyssey.

timestamps.text: Tell Lucille about the disaster you had with the stationers.
Well, of course, the invitations had to be sent back twice.
Let me tell you what an odyssey.
